---
title: "My Projects"
---

## Research Participation Analysis

::: project-card
### Overview

This project analyzed how students’ research participation relates to learning outcomes, attitudes, motivation, and future participation intentions.

### Skills Used

-   R
-   Quarto
-   ggplot2
-   Data visualization
-   Survey analysis

### Key Research Questions

-   Does participation improve learning outcomes?
-   Does study quality affect attitudes?
-   Does motivation influence learning?
-   Do attitudes predict future participation?

[View Presentation](Group-1-Proposalcopy.html){.btn}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Data Visualization Assignment 

::: project-card
### Overview

Created visuals to practice data visualization using data.

### Example Visuals

-   Histograms
-   Scatterplots
-   Boxplots
-   Bar graphs

### Key Takeaway

Data visualization helped explain how participation experiences connect to student learning and engagement.

[View My assignment](Villegas, Vianey-M04-Reflection Essay-Advanced Data-Viz.html){.btn}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Marketing Analytics Case Study

::: {.project-card}

### Overview

In my **Consumer Behavior** course, I worked on a project analyzing the brand **ALO Yoga** and developed a creative brand extension into the **pet market**.

The project explored how ALO’s identity could expand into pet products while maintaining brand consistency.

---

### What I Did

- Analyzed ALO’s **target audience and brand positioning**  
- Applied **consumer behavior theories**  
- Developed a **pet-focused product line concept**  
- Created branding and marketing strategies  

---

### Key Insight

The extension shows how lifestyle brands can expand into new markets by aligning with their customers’ values and behaviors.

---

### Presentation

[View My Project Slides](Alo-for-pets.pdf){.btn}

:::
